homepage.title: RadalyX - robotic CT for non-destructive testing
homepage.description: RadalyX is the robotic imaging system becoming a very powerful tool for non-destructive inspection.
homepage.text_excerpt:
RadalyX - robotic CT for non-destructive testing
About
Radalytica is the game-changer in imaging, offering the world's only portable robotic 3D CT and ultrasound scanner allowing the imaging of large objects.
RadalyX, a unique robotic imaging system, combines next-generation digital X-ray sensors with robotics to enhance imaging for a broader range of industrial and scientific applications. It enables advanced non-destructive testing and diagnostics, even in previously inaccessible areas.
Our product is not only competing with existing solutions. IT OPENS NEW AREAS!
